title: The Role of Emotion in Global Warming Policy Support and Opposition

tax_mentions.context: Policy support item in climate-policy battery; 34% supported a 25-cent-per-gallon gasoline tax increase.
tax_mentions.notes: Tax item embedded in broader policy battery.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: An emissions trading policy, not a tax.

inclusion_reason: Includes a directly measured gasoline tax increase item and reports public support for it within the climate-policy battery.
